title: xQc leaves stream abruptly after falling sick as Sidemen Charity Match 2026 plans face uncertainty
summary_full: Felix xQc Lengyel ended his Twitch stream early after falling sick during training for the Sidemen Charity Match 2026. He admitted to vomiting and feeling unwell, while Nicholas Jynxzi tried to help him recover. During the stream, xQc also revealed he barely drinks water, raising concerns about his health ahead of the upcoming match.
